recipes.title: XO醬意粉
recipes.description: Quick and flavorful XO sauce pasta perfect for busy weeknights
steps: Cook pasta according to package directions, drain and set aside.
Heat oil in a wok over high heat. Add shallot and garlic, stir-fry for 30 seconds.
Add XO sauce and oyster sauce, stir for 1 minute.
Add cooked pasta, toss well to coat evenly.
Add sugar substitute, toss for another minute.
Garnish with cilantro and serve immediately.
recipes.tips: For a healthier version, use whole wheat pasta and reduce oil amount.

recipes.title: 免治牛肉飯
recipes.description: Classic Hong Kong-style minced beef over steamed rice
steps: Cook jasmine rice according to package directions.
Mix ground beef with soy sauce, sesame oil, and cornstarch. Marinate for 10 minutes.
Heat oil in a wok over high heat. Add onion and garlic, stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add marinated beef, break apart and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add 1/4 cup water, cover and simmer for 3 minutes.
Serve beef over steamed rice with steamed vegetables.
recipes.tips: Use lean beef to reduce fat content. Serve with steamed broccoli for extra nutrients.

recipes.title: 奶油蘑菇意粉
recipes.description: Rich creamy pasta with fresh mushrooms and herbs
steps: Cook pasta until al dente, reserve 1/2 cup pasta water.
Heat olive oil in a large pan. Add mushrooms, cook until golden, about 4 minutes.
Add garlic, cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Pour in cream and reserved pasta water, bring to a simmer.
Add cooked pasta, toss to combine.
Top with parmesan and fresh thyme. Season with salt and pepper.
recipes.tips: Use zucchini noodles for a low-carb alternative to regular pasta.

recipes.title: 烤雞沙律
recipes.description: Healthy grilled chicken salad with fresh vegetables
steps: Season chicken breast with salt, pepper, and olive oil.
Grill chicken for 6-7 minutes per side until cooked through.
Let chicken rest for 5 minutes, then slice.
Arrange mixed greens on plates.
Top with cucumber, tomatoes, red onion, and sliced chicken.
Drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice dressing.
recipes.tips: Excellent for meal prep - grill extra chicken for the week.

recipes.title: 照燒雞肉飯
recipes.description: Classic Japanese teriyaki chicken over rice with vegetables
steps: Cook rice according to package directions.
Mix soy sauce, mirin, rice vinegar, and sweetener for teriyaki sauce.
Heat oil in a pan. Cook chicken skin-side down for 5 minutes.
Flip and cook for another 3 minutes.
Pour teriyaki sauce over chicken, simmer until sauce thickens.
Slice chicken and serve over rice with steamed broccoli.
recipes.tips: Use sugar-free sweetener instead of sugar for diabetic-friendly version.

recipes.title: 味噌湯
recipes.description: Traditional Japanese miso soup with tofu and seaweed
steps: Heat dashi stock in a pot over medium heat.
Add tofu cubes, simmer for 2 minutes.
Remove from heat, stir in miso paste (do not boil after adding miso).
Add shredded nori and wakame if using.
Garnish with green onions.
Drizzle with sesame oil and serve.
recipes.tips: Never boil miso soup after adding miso paste - it loses beneficial bacteria.

recipes.title: 泰式炒河
recipes.description: Classic Thai stir-fried rice noodles with shrimp
steps: Soak rice noodles in warm water for 30 minutes, drain.
Mix fish sauce, tamarind paste, and sweetener for sauce.
Heat oil in a wok. Stir-fry shrimp until pink, remove and set aside.
Add eggs to wok, scramble.
Add noodles and sauce, toss for 2 minutes.
Add shrimp and bean sprouts, toss together.
Serve with peanuts, cilantro, and lime wedges.
recipes.tips: Use coconut aminos instead of fish sauce for a vegetarian version.

recipes.title: 泰式青咖喱
recipes.description: Aromatic Thai green curry with vegetables and coconut milk
steps: Heat 1/4 cup coconut milk in a pot. Add curry paste, stir until fragrant.
Add chicken, cook until no longer pink, about 5 minutes.
Pour in remaining coconut milk, add fish sauce and sweetener.
Add eggplant and bell pepper, simmer for 10 minutes.
Stir in Thai basil leaves.
Serve over jasmine rice.
recipes.tips: Use light coconut milk to reduce calories and fat content.

recipes.title: 越式法包
recipes.description: Vietnamese sandwich with pickled vegetables and herbs
steps: Slice banh mi rolls lengthwise.
Spread with mayo or butter.
Layer with grilled meat, pickled vegetables, cucumber.
Add fresh cilantro and jalapeño slices.
Drizzle with hoisin sauce.
Close sandwich and serve immediately.
recipes.tips: Make pickled vegetables ahead for meal prep - they keep for 1 week.

recipes.title: 韓式石鍋拌飯
recipes.description: Korean mixed rice bowl with vegetables and gochujang
steps: Cook rice and keep warm.
Blanch spinach, squeeze dry, season with sesame oil.
Sauté carrot and zucchini separately until tender.
Cook beef bulgogi in a pan until done.
Place rice in bowls, arrange vegetables and meat on top.
Add fried egg and gochujang on the side.
Mix well before eating.
recipes.tips: For a lighter version, use cauliflower rice instead of regular rice.

recipes.title: 台灣滷肉飯
recipes.description: Taiwanese comfort food with braised pork over rice
steps: Blanch pork belly in boiling water for 5 minutes, drain.
Mix soy sauce, rock sugar substitute, garlic, and star anise for braising sauce.
Heat oil in a pot. Brown the pork pieces.
Add braising sauce and 2 cups water.
Simmer for 20 minutes until pork is tender.
Serve over steamed rice with hard-boiled egg and steamed greens.
recipes.tips: Use pork shoulder for leaner meat, or chicken for lower fat option.

recipes.title: 蛋炒飯
recipes.description: Classic Chinese egg fried rice - simple and satisfying
steps: Heat oil in a wok over high heat.
Add beaten eggs, scramble quickly, remove and set aside.
Add more oil, stir-fry frozen vegetables for 2 minutes.
Add rice, break apart and stir-fry for 3 minutes.
Add soy sauce, sesame oil, and white pepper.
Add scrambled eggs back, toss to combine.
Garnish with green onions and serve.
recipes.tips: Use day-old refrigerated rice for best texture. Cauliflower rice works for low-carb.
